reviews.review_description:
There is a hell of a lot to this game. Some of the side missions could be fully fledged games in their own right. Hours and hours of game play with none of the usual pressure.

Recommended 

4 stars because I found a bug on one of the "debug" labeled missions. When you have set a path for the people to follow and the signpost doesn't appear attack the 45 degree building in the middle. Once destroyed it appears. No reason to destroy the building , did it out of frustration 😅
my game is glitching i'm stuck in a black screen and i don't know what to do

Tentacular is a fantastic (or should I say spectacular?) VR game where you play as a giant octopus trying to live a human life — complete with work, tasks, and quirky missions. The environments are colorful and full of personality, and each mini-mission feels unique and cleverly designed.

I honestly didn’t expect to enjoy it this much, but it’s an absolute blast. Huge thanks to my friend for the recommendation — it’s well worth diving into this tentacled adventure!

The main game is alright, but the side quests are very poor. For the rocket flinging side quest it is never consistent. Each guess of how it works is wrong. Alongside that, many janky mechanics/bugs have occured. Items not doing anything, people not talking when needed, and characters clipping through the world. I see the vision but this game needs some more time in development.
I do not like the game because I’m stuck on￼ 4/5 and I hate it because it doesn’t help me￼

So I was playing the game today with the island builder expansion update and Inwas using the creation glove but when I tried to switch modes it kept automatically going backwards and when I used the create section the same thing happened so pls try to improve the joystick for going forward backwards up and down

I've gone back and played this game a few times since it released. It takes a bit to get used to your tentacles that you use to help the townsfolk build structures and save the city. 
This is a family-friendly game with amusing graphics and dialog. I tend to get frustrated with some of the challenges, but I always end up coming back to this game for its unique gameplay and style.

reviews.review_title: This game needs an update soon.
reviews.review_description: This game is amazing! Love the graphics, story, mechanics, and a lot more. But I'm pretty sure this game is discontinued 😢, which sucks, because I really like it. Also plz buy it, it will help the devs and hopefully tentacular will be continued again.

I ordinarily like shooting and action games but this game is so cute and funny.  One of a kind.  The first game i didn’t even consider returning to the store.  Its actually good for your arms too.  A very light workout and an all around good time.  Its totally tennntaculaarrrrrr!! 💯💯

Solid game. Casual enough to play seated, (⁠つ⁠≧⁠▽⁠≦⁠)⁠つ entertaining for sure with you would update and use voice acting. I can understand it being costly if you can't get volunteers/have the people on hand. Would really push the value for sure however. The readability is very good though.

Cheat codes? 
-Pinkcity
-unlockal

Go get your tentacles around this gem!

What a great game this is!
It has everything! … great graphics, great sound, great physics, great humour, great gameplay!

This really took me by surprise how great this is. I thought it looked fun and a good.. but this goes beyond my expectations.
Takes a place amongst my favourite Quest games.

The tutorials are so enjoyable and fun.
Has a story mode and also a sandbox mode, where you can build your own island town!
You can also view (and destroy) other players creations to get some inspiration for your own ideas. 
Build anything from castles to evil lairs lol
As you play the game, you unlock extra objects to use or build with.

Love how the little people go about their day, and you can look at them close up or even pick them up and have a look at them and place them where you want…. Put them in the sea for a swim, place on a lighthouse, or even stick them on a boat.

The things you can do in this are limitless! 

There’s a puzzle element to this game also on how to move things about to work out how to activate, move or find what you need to.

Very classy and top quality in every area.

Has everything you would want in a game.. the humour is great too!

Highly recommend this!!

This game is really original and fun. You are a big sea-monster and it's time for you to start acting like an adult according to the rest of the community so you'll need to get a job. In the tasks you get you can interact with the small people (like throwing them in the water), mess with their stuff, cars and buildings. You can even play around on your own island. The game is making use of the possibilities in VR very well.
I love the the game and how the physics work! I like how every part of the game is relplayable too! This really deserves more attention, anyways, Bye you Tentacular people!

Picking up and manipulating things with tentacles simply doesn't make a game all on its own.

Tedious dialog
Tedious tasks
No challenge, no story, no excitement, no engagement.

It gets a second star for originality.

The best way to describe tentacular is to think of being able to play with Playmobil toys in a toy town with giant octopus tentacles and you're pretty much there. Its a very polished fun game to mess around with. I was putting many characters as I can in a hot air balloon, creating traffic jams on an island and causing chaos as I go and seeing the physics and how people react to what you do which never gets tiring. The story is nice and fun so far too which gets you into playing with the physics of all the objects in the game and meet all the quirky characters along the way.
It’s kind of good I can’t pass m.a.g.n.e.t.s level two but still Eh🦑🦑🦑🦑🐙🐙🐙🐙🦑🦑🦑🦑🦑🐙🐙🐙🦑🦑🦑🦑

I bought the game months ago and played it for a few hours. Took a break and came back to my game not working whenever I'd open the game the loading screen would freeze and shake not allowing me to get into the game it hasn't worked since and I'm very upset because I was having fun playing it and it's not working.

developer_response.body:
We're sorry to hear you're having issues with Tentacular. The problem you're describing sounds like a corrupted save file caused by a technical problem with the Meta cloud backup. 
Even after a reinstall the game will try to load a corrupted save file from the cloud backup.
Deleting the cloud save backup might be a solution you could try. Be aware that all progress will be lost – which it would be anyway if the save file is corrupt.
Users can delete their save games here https://secure.oculus.com/my/cloud-backup/
Please tell us if this helps. If you'd like more direct support please join our Discord discord.gg/firepunchd

reviews.review_description:
I was excited to try this one based on reviews, but I am not a fan of games with long narratives between gameplay and this one is the worst. It takes forever to get to each section that you actually get to do something. The language the people speak is annoying and I just couldn’t get past that. I don’t mind subtitles, but man they take forever!

They should create a skip option so you can move through quicker.

developer_response.body: We're sorry to hear that you're not enjoying the conversations. You can change the speed and even turn off the typewriter effect of the characters alltogether in the options scene. If you tap the characters with these options enabled you can really  blast through the talking. Why don't you try that?

reviews.review_description:
Here is the 25% off link: http://bit.ly/3XwLoZK

This is as funny and unique as they come. Such cute little graphics, but be warned: not all puzzles are easy! In fact, you'll find yourself scratching your head with a wet tentacle for a few. Overall, a complete blast to play through. HIGHLY recommended.

It's a cute little game and I'm not upset that I bought it (especially because I saved 25% by using a referral). The gameplay is overall satisfying. The graphics are cute. Some of the puzzles are surprisingly hard to figure out. But other than that, I'd say this is a good game for younger people :)

Ultimately tentacle interactions aren't that much fun and varied. Plus there is a lot of text to click through to advance. I eventually got stuck and quite frustrated in the "carry heavy blocks with thick part of the tentacles" part which just seems like horrible design to me" (I build VR apps as well)

I got bored, mechanics too basic for me.  
25% off if needed: vr.miketunes.com/tent
I bought the game cause I wanted something unique to vr but the tutorial was to much like it’s just tenticals not to hard also the levels aren’t that great

We are stuck at the beginning of the game in the city and can not figure out how to go anywhere else. There are no instructions and when you pull the switch in the city it just takes you to the beginning. My son hasnt played an hours worth of this worthless game.

developer_response.body: We're really sorry to hear that the user experience is causing problems. We'd love to help you enjoy the game. In the city you should be able to talk to the humans which have a question mark over their head by tapping them. These humans will allow you to continue the missions. Please join our Discord server to get more help discord.gg/firepunchd

reviews.review_description: I feel nauseous from how I have to move. Have to read a lot about instead of just listening which is really annoying in 3d goggles. Why characters speak “blabla”?! The quests are not exciting at all but when you are stuck figuring out the mechanics - you are just stuck, no work around, no another quest to go for. I wish I could return it but I waited for too long to start playing and don’t qualify for a refund anymore.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the feedback. We're sorry to hear you're not enjyoing the game. Did you try turning on the blinders in the options scene? This ususally helps with motion sickness.

reviews.review_title: The game is not the best.
reviews.review_description: The game is not bad in my opinion I just do like It and I can't find out how to get a refund because I want my money back

They have super hard levels I always need to use a hint it sucks do not buy this game I realize how bad the game is and tried to refund it but I didn’t please don’t buy this game don’t waste your money

developer_response.body: We're really sorry to hear that you're not enjoying Tentacular. We'd love to get more feedback from you about the difficulties you've encountered so we can make the experience more pleasant for everyone. Please join our Discord to talk to us and the community discord.gg/firepunchd

reviews.review_description: I sucks the arms need wiggle and not show this game sucks so bad I hate it so much and it’s not a good game
I can’t get past the 2 stacking girls missions and I’m getting really mad and now I can’t progress through the game

developer_response.body: We're sorry to hear that you're having issues with the stacking quests. Only "Stacking it good I" is part of the main quest line and needs to be completed to be able to progress in the story . If you are having problems in "Stacking I" try to talk to Signor Resetto who lives in the Reset House. He will help you!   "Stacking it good II" and "Stacking it good III" are only side quests and pretty challenging. If you still think there is a problem/bug please reach out to us by visiting our Discord discord.gg/firepunchd

reviews.review_description:
The controls are terrible and it makes the game so frustrating.
I am trying to see if I can return the game for my money back and I have never wanted to do that before.

developer_response.body: We're really sorry to hear that. We've tried to craft a fun experience that includes some challenges in the course of the game.

Great game.  Cute story, controls are good, graphics are good, FPS is great, no issues.  Strongly prefer smooth turning instead of snap but not an option.  Also I wish the tentacles weren't cut off at the elbow, see no reason they couldn't go all the way to the shoulders, that's just an immersion/visual gripe.  Had one minor issue pulling the yellow shipping container out.  After I did the guy kept telling me to pull it.  I saw the UFO and figured out to touch it, but a younger player might become frustrated that following the instructions does not progress.  So just a minor play testing issue there but overall the game is wonderful.  Expected a little more "destroy all humans" and less "job simulator" but not complaining, fun to just goof around in a non violent way sometimes.   Maybe the rampant destruction comes in later levels (I only reached the playground stage, maybe 30 minutes play time.)

Loved this game, the gameplay for me was on and off for around 3 days, the puzzles were fun and it wasn’t too hard. Definitely recommend if you want a casual gaming experience, careful about buying if you’re not a patient person when it comes to stacking. Just remember that trying new methods will definitely help.

This app is actually super good you can be a octopus and you have large tentacles and you can knock anything over and there's so much experience even you can get tons of achievements and stuff and yeah it's just super cool so I recommend 5 star and I recommend you guys getting it I hope you guys like the game bye bye

I only played this for about 2 hours and I enjoy the game. The funny mechanics are a bonus aswell. Its not too challenging but not too easy. And u can follow the story while being silly at the same time. Thanks for this game, developers. I look forward to finishing this game
